text: Welcome aboard as a moderator! Please review the moderator guidelines and jump into the mod-intros channel to say hi.
Welcome aboard as an event helper! Please check the events board and intro yourself in the helpers channel.
Welcome to the community! You’ve been approved as a member—feel free to introduce yourself in #introductions and check out the getting-started guide.
Welcome aboard as a mentor! Please review the mentor guidelines and say hello in the mentors channel.
